channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Footage shared online by first responders shows a huge blaze…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Footage shared online by first responders shows a huge blaze raging and plumes coming out of the front door of the pub in the northern part of the Thai capital. n.pr/4f2L3Zq
item.content:encoded: Footage shared online by first responders shows a huge blaze raging and plumes coming out of the front door of the pub in the northern part of the Thai capital. n.pr/4f2L3Zq

item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)

item.title: At least two people are dead and at least four people are in…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: At least two people are dead and at least four people are injured after a shooting on Saturday night at a festival celebrating Latin culture in Canada's biggest city. n.pr/4pm1OUu
item.content:encoded: At least two people are dead and at least four people are injured after a shooting on Saturday night at a festival celebrating Latin culture in Canada's biggest city. n.pr/4pm1OUu

item.title: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters w…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters with personalized text messages making AI-generated texting conversations the latest tool political campaigns are using to connect. n.pr/4wBRPN1
item.content:encoded: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters with personalized text messages making AI-generated texting conversations the latest tool political campaigns are using to connect. n.pr/4wBRPN1

item.title: Cool Band Alert! Edgar. The Gist? Dark dance music for ‘80s …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Cool Band Alert! Edgar. The Gist? Dark dance music for ‘80s haunted houses. Check it out on Substack.
item.content:encoded: Cool Band Alert! Edgar. The Gist? Dark dance music for ‘80s haunted houses. Check it out on Substack.

item.title: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddie…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddies. The hope is they'll fertilize the crop, be a source of food ... and eat the snails that carry parasitic worms.
item.content:encoded: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddies. The hope is they'll fertilize the crop, be a source of food ... and eat the snails that carry parasitic worms.

item.title: A historic rainfall event has left communities across severa…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A historic rainfall event has left communities across several Missouri counties underwater and prompted water rescues, including an evacuation of a summer camp.
item.content:encoded: A historic rainfall event has left communities across several Missouri counties underwater and prompted water rescues, including an evacuation of a summer camp.

item.title: Seven records. Seven different worlds. Dive into this week's…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Seven records. Seven different worlds. Dive into this week's Essential Releases, from mesmerizing ambient electronics to soul, hip-hop, experimental jazz, and doom metal.
item.content:encoded: Seven records. Seven different worlds. Dive into this week's Essential Releases, from mesmerizing ambient electronics to soul, hip-hop, experimental jazz, and doom metal.

item.title: A surge of cases of the intestinal illness that causes diarr…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A surge of cases of the intestinal illness that causes diarrhea and nausea has been detected in 31 states, according to federal health authorities, but the source is still under investigation. n.pr/4guWrQn
item.content:encoded: A surge of cases of the intestinal illness that causes diarrhea and nausea has been detected in 31 states, according to federal health authorities, but the source is still under investigation. n.pr/4guWrQn

item.title: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters w…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters with personalized text messages making AI-generated texting conversations the latest tool political campaigns are using to connect.
item.content:encoded: Taught to sound like a candidate, bots are engaging voters with personalized text messages making AI-generated texting conversations the latest tool political campaigns are using to connect.

item.title: Reissues of jazz fusion records are dominating this week's b…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: Reissues of jazz fusion records are dominating this week's best-selling list on Discogs. What's your favorite album from this subgenre?
item.content:encoded: Reissues of jazz fusion records are dominating this week's best-selling list on Discogs. What's your favorite album from this subgenre?

item.title: Ellicott City indie phenom Lindsey Jordan released Snail Mai…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Ellicott City indie phenom Lindsey Jordan released Snail Mail’s ‘Habit’ EP 10 years ago today
item.content:encoded: Ellicott City indie phenom Lindsey Jordan released Snail Mail’s ‘Habit’ EP 10 years ago today

item.title: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that administrators are questioning what art can — and can't — be seen on campus.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that administrators are questioning what art can — and can't — be seen on campus.

item.title: Effects pedals, blown amps, walls of feedback, and a lifelon…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Effects pedals, blown amps, walls of feedback, and a lifelong obsession with volume. Oliver Ackermann takes us inside Death By Audio and the creative force behind A Place to Bury Strangers. Read out latest edition of Underground Medicine.
item.content:encoded: Effects pedals, blown amps, walls of feedback, and a lifelong obsession with volume. Oliver Ackermann takes us inside Death By Audio and the creative force behind A Place to Bury Strangers. Read out latest edition of Underground Medicine.

item.title: After getting hit with tariffs for the imported board games …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: After getting hit with tariffs for the imported board games he sells, Jonathan Silva decided to see if he could produce a version of his Monopoly game in the United States. This is what he learned.
item.content:encoded: After getting hit with tariffs for the imported board games he sells, Jonathan Silva decided to see if he could produce a version of his Monopoly game in the United States. This is what he learned.

item.title: A GE Appliances plant in rural northwest Georgia was short h…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A GE Appliances plant in rural northwest Georgia was short hundreds of workers amid COVID-19. A flexible work option where some workers can sign up for shifts through an app has eased the pain.
item.content:encoded: A GE Appliances plant in rural northwest Georgia was short hundreds of workers amid COVID-19. A flexible work option where some workers can sign up for shifts through an app has eased the pain.

item.title: This is prog we’re talking about—either none of it is cool, …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: This is prog we’re talking about—either none of it is cool, or all of it is cool, depending on where you’re standing, and we’ll be definitively adopting the latter stance. Have you read Prog Is a State of Mind yet?
item.content:encoded: This is prog we’re talking about—either none of it is cool, or all of it is cool, depending on where you’re standing, and we’ll be definitively adopting the latter stance. Have you read Prog Is a State of Mind yet?

item.title: The U.S. and Iran have been exchanging strikes, with the U.S…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. and Iran have been exchanging strikes, with the U.S. military saying it hit 140 targets in Iran overnight, while Iran said it responded with fire toward Jordan and other Gulf states.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. and Iran have been exchanging strikes, with the U.S. military saying it hit 140 targets in Iran overnight, while Iran said it responded with fire toward Jordan and other Gulf states.

item.title: On her new album ‘POWER HOUSE,’ Montreal-based Magi Merlin w…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: On her new album ‘POWER HOUSE,’ Montreal-based Magi Merlin weaves together soulful vocals, steampunk R&B, and amorphous trip-hop, alongside collaborator and co-writer Funkywhat. Check it out if you're in the mood for funky, chrome-plated jams to soundtrack a lazy Sunday.
item.content:encoded: On her new album ‘POWER HOUSE,’ Montreal-based Magi Merlin weaves together soulful vocals, steampunk R&B, and amorphous trip-hop, alongside collaborator and co-writer Funkywhat. Check it out if you're in the mood for funky, chrome-plated jams to soundtrack a lazy Sunday.

item.title: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddie…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddies. The hope is they'll fertilize the crop, be a source of food ... and eat the snails that carry parasitic worms.
item.content:encoded: Farmers in Senegal are welcoming fish into their rice paddies. The hope is they'll fertilize the crop, be a source of food ... and eat the snails that carry parasitic worms.

item.title: His office said Graham died Saturday night after a "brief an…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: His office said Graham died Saturday night after a "brief and sudden illness." Graham was instrumental in enacting Trump's policy and staffing priorities in the Senate.
item.content:encoded: His office said Graham died Saturday night after a "brief and sudden illness." Graham was instrumental in enacting Trump's policy and staffing priorities in the Senate.

item.title: Julian Alvarez sent defending champion Argentina into the Wo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Julian Alvarez sent defending champion Argentina into the World Cup semifinals with a long-range strike in the 112th minute against Switzerland. n.pr/3TbZ7Zq
item.content:encoded: Julian Alvarez sent defending champion Argentina into the World Cup semifinals with a long-range strike in the 112th minute against Switzerland. n.pr/3TbZ7Zq

item.title: A newly announced ban on smartphones for government workers,…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A newly announced ban on smartphones for government workers, police and military personnel is spilling over into healthcare and educational facilities. Ordinary citizens worry they'll be next.
item.content:encoded: A newly announced ban on smartphones for government workers, police and military personnel is spilling over into healthcare and educational facilities. Ordinary citizens worry they'll be next.

item.title: The ever-evolving Bob Dylan band brought on yet another new …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The ever-evolving Bob Dylan band brought on yet another new guitarist in Cincinnati
item.content:encoded: The ever-evolving Bob Dylan band brought on yet another new guitarist in Cincinnati

item.title: Jay-Z brought out Eminem, Slick Rick, and Pharrell Williams …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Jay-Z brought out Eminem, Slick Rick, and Pharrell Williams during his second night at Yankee Stadium
item.content:encoded: Jay-Z brought out Eminem, Slick Rick, and Pharrell Williams during his second night at Yankee Stadium

item.title: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the fede…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the federal government to cut internet costs. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr called for ending this program before Donald Trump tapped him for the job.
item.content:encoded: Many schools rely on consumer fees funneled through the federal government to cut internet costs. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr called for ending this program before Donald Trump tapped him for the job.

item.title: We're in that phase of summer pop doldrums when the same son…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: We're in that phase of summer pop doldrums when the same songs seem to be on repeat week after week. Can Stella Lefty, Yung Miami or Malcolm Todd make a run to crack the top 10?
item.content:encoded: We're in that phase of summer pop doldrums when the same songs seem to be on repeat week after week. Can Stella Lefty, Yung Miami or Malcolm Todd make a run to crack the top 10?

item.title: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after him while in office. The Trump Organization says he won't get royalties from the renaming, but legal experts see potential loopholes.
item.content:encoded: Trump is the first president to have an airport named after him while in office. The Trump Organization says he won't get royalties from the renaming, but legal experts see potential loopholes.

item.title: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that administrators are questioning what art can — and can't — be seen on campus. n.pr/4faIm8p
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration's executive orders have meant that administrators are questioning what art can — and can't — be seen on campus. n.pr/4faIm8p

item.title: 絢香、20周年を記念した アコースティックセッション企画始動 https://natalie.mu/music/ne…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
絢香、20周年を記念した
アコースティックセッション企画始動
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680463?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

初回は「にじいろ」🌈

#絢香
item.content:encoded:
絢香、20周年を記念した
